description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Vcpkg Build that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that builds vcpkg across ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest environments. For each environment, install necessary dependencies, check out the repository with submodules, set up the environment, generate Ninja project files with CMake using vcpkg's toolchain, build the project, and upload the build artifact.
